nodes.name: backend.rs
nodes.summary: Backend selection: enumerates simulator backends (state-vector, stabilizer, tensor-network, Clifford+T) and chooses the cheapest one for a given circuit.

nodes.name: benchmark.rs
nodes.summary: Synthetic benchmark suite: routing, entanglement budgets, decoder timing, and certification benchmarks with formatted reports.

nodes.name: circuit_analyzer.rs
nodes.summary: Static circuit analysis: gate classification, Clifford detection, T-count, entanglement pairs, nearest-neighbor check, and bond-dimension estimate.

nodes.name: circuit.rs
nodes.summary: Fluent QuantumCircuit builder API for appending gates, measurements, resets, and barriers.

nodes.name: clifford_t.rs
nodes.summary: Clifford+T sparse stabilizer-decomposition simulator scaling sub-exponentially with T-count for limited-magic circuits.

nodes.name: confidence.rs
nodes.summary: Statistical confidence intervals (Wilson, Clopper-Pearson), chi-squared tests, TVD, and required-shots estimation for quantum measurement statistics.

nodes.name: control_theory.rs
nodes.summary: Closed-loop QEC control theory: stability conditions, max-stable distance, latency budgets, resource allocation, and scaling laws.

nodes.name: decoder.rs
nodes.summary: Surface-code decoders: Union-Find, Partitioned, adaptive code distance, and a logical-qubit allocator with decoder benchmark harness.

nodes.name: decomposition.rs
nodes.summary: Circuit decomposition: interaction graph, temporal/spatial partitioning (Stoer-Wagner min-cut), per-segment cost estimation, and result stitching with fidelity.

nodes.name: error.rs
nodes.summary: QuantumError enum and Result type alias for ruqu-core operations.

nodes.name: gate.rs
nodes.summary: Gate enum covering all supported quantum gates plus helper methods for qubit indices and matrix data.

nodes.name: hardware.rs
nodes.summary: HardwareProvider trait and concrete providers (LocalSimulator, IBM Quantum, IonQ, Rigetti, Amazon Braket) with device info, calibration, and job lifecycle.

nodes.name: lib.rs
nodes.summary: ruqu-core crate root declaring backend, circuit, decoder, planner, simulator, stabilizer, tensor_network, transpiler, hardware, and prelude modules.

nodes.name: mitigation.rs
nodes.summary: Quantum error mitigation: zero-noise extrapolation (Richardson/polynomial/linear), measurement-error correction, and Clifford data regression.

nodes.name: mixed_precision.rs
nodes.summary: Complex32 type and QuantumStateF32 single-precision state vector for memory-constrained or GPU-bound simulation.

nodes.name: noise.rs
nodes.summary: Realistic noise models: device calibration, thermal relaxation, depolarizing/amplitude/phase-damping Kraus operators, and readout error correction.

nodes.name: optimizer.rs
nodes.summary: Gate-level optimisation utilities: 2x2 matrix multiplication, fusibility check, and gate fusion pass.

nodes.name: pipeline.rs
nodes.summary: End-to-end execution pipeline that decomposes a circuit, runs each segment on its selected backend, and stitches the results with fidelity estimation.

nodes.name: planner.rs
nodes.summary: Execution planner that picks backend, mitigation strategy, and verification policy from circuit features, and produces a cost breakdown and entanglement budget.

nodes.name: qasm.rs
nodes.summary: QASM3 emitter: ZYZ-angle decomposition of arbitrary unitaries plus gate-by-gate textual emission of a QuantumCircuit.

nodes.name: qec_scheduler.rs
nodes.summary: Surface-code QEC scheduler: stabilizer extraction round generation, feed-forward optimization, dependency graph, and critical-path analysis.

nodes.name: replay.rs
nodes.summary: Deterministic ReplayEngine that records circuit, noise config, and measurement outcomes for bit-exact reproduction and witness verification.

nodes.name: BackendType
nodes.summary: Enumeration of simulator backends: StateVector, Stabilizer, TensorNetwork, CliffordT, Mps, etc.

nodes.name: analyze_circuit
nodes.summary: Static-analysis pass that produces a CircuitAnalysis summary used to pick a backend.

nodes.name: scaling_report
nodes.summary: Generates predicted memory/time scaling info per backend.

nodes.name: QuantumCircuit
nodes.summary: Mutable list-of-gates circuit representation; the foundational type used throughout ruqu-core.

nodes.name: CliffordTState
nodes.summary: Sparse stabilizer-decomposition state used to simulate Clifford+T circuits efficiently.

nodes.name: wilson_interval
nodes.summary: Computes a Wilson score confidence interval for a binomial proportion.

nodes.name: required_shots
nodes.summary: Returns the number of shots needed to achieve (epsilon, delta) statistical guarantees.

nodes.name: UnionFindDecoder
nodes.summary: Sparse union-find surface-code decoder implementing the SurfaceCodeDecoder trait.

nodes.name: PartitionedDecoder
nodes.summary: Decoder that partitions the syndrome graph into independent regions decoded in parallel.

nodes.name: SurfaceCodeDecoder
nodes.summary: Trait abstraction for surface-code syndrome decoders; provides a uniform decode_syndrome API.

nodes.name: LogicalQubitAllocator
nodes.summary: Allocates logical qubits to surface-code patches, tracking adjacency and operations.

nodes.name: stoer_wagner_mincut
nodes.summary: Stoer-Wagner global minimum-cut on a circuit interaction graph used to find optimal spatial splits.

nodes.name: decompose
nodes.summary: Top-level entry that picks the best (temporal/spatial) decomposition strategy bounded by max segment qubits.

nodes.name: QuantumError
nodes.summary: Top-level error enum for ruqu-core (invalid qubit count, gate index, dimension mismatch, etc.).

nodes.name: Gate
nodes.summary: Sum type of all supported gates: H, X, Y, Z, S, T, RX/RY/RZ, CNOT, CZ, SWAP, RZZ, Measure, Reset, Barrier, U3.

nodes.name: HardwareProvider
nodes.summary: Async-capable trait abstracting quantum-hardware vendors (job submission, status polling, calibration retrieval).

nodes.name: LocalSimulatorProvider
nodes.summary: In-process HardwareProvider that runs circuits via the local ruqu-core simulator.

nodes.name: IbmQuantumProvider
nodes.summary: HardwareProvider implementation for IBM Quantum hardware with heavy-hex coupling map.

nodes.name: IonQProvider
nodes.summary: HardwareProvider implementation for IonQ trapped-ion devices.

nodes.name: ProviderRegistry
nodes.summary: Registry that selects a HardwareProvider by provider type for a unified frontend API.

nodes.name: Complex32
nodes.summary: Single-precision complex number with full Add/Sub/Mul/Neg/Display impls.

nodes.name: QuantumStateF32
nodes.summary: Half-memory single-precision counterpart to QuantumState for large simulations.

nodes.name: EnhancedNoiseModel
nodes.summary: Composite noise model combining depolarizing, thermal relaxation, and readout error per gate type.

nodes.name: depolarizing_kraus
nodes.summary: Returns Kraus operators for a single-qubit depolarizing channel with probability p.

nodes.name: thermal_relaxation_kraus
nodes.summary: Computes Kraus operators for combined T1/T2 thermal relaxation over a gate time.

nodes.name: fuse_gates
nodes.summary: Single-pass optimizer that fuses adjacent compatible gates into a single matrix multiplication.

nodes.name: Pipeline
nodes.summary: Pipeline orchestrator that runs decomposition, per-segment simulation, and result stitching with optional verification.

nodes.name: plan_execution
nodes.summary: Top-level planner that builds an ExecutionPlan with backend, mitigation, and verification choices.

nodes.name: to_qasm3
nodes.summary: Serializes a QuantumCircuit to OpenQASM3 source.

nodes.name: generate_surface_code_schedule
nodes.summary: Generates a full QEC schedule for a rotated surface code of given distance and round count.

nodes.name: build_dependency_graph
nodes.summary: Builds a dependency graph over scheduled QEC operations used for critical-path analysis.

nodes.name: ReplayEngine
nodes.summary: Records and replays quantum executions deterministically for witness verification.
